## Checklist

- [ ] If any cached asset (`index.html`, `app.js`, `style.css`, `psalter.json`, `manifest.webmanifest`, `icon.svg`) changed, bumped `VERSION` in `sw.js`.
- [ ] Tested locally with `./serve.ps1` (or `python -m http.server`).
- [ ] No new dependencies, build steps, or frameworks were added (this repo is intentionally no-build).
